recent_form_summary: Won 3 straight matches in straight sets at Bad Homburg to reach the semifinals.
stat_trend_summary: Hit 7 aces in each of her last two matches after hitting only 1 in the rain-interrupted first round.
opponent_factor_summary: Xinyu Wang advanced via walkover (Svitolina withdrew due to exhaustion). No major opponent-specific ace trends identified.
injury_news: None. She reports feeling good and comfortable in the heat.
notes: Osaka is in great form on grass, reaching her first SF on the surface since 2018. Her serve has been a weapon, hitting 7 aces in both the R16 and QF. Given her current rhythm, she has a solid chance of clearing the 8.5 line, though her recent matches have been quick straight-set wins which limits her total ace opportunities.
